full_text:
Ma Xiang 馬相
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Xiang (馬相). Rebelled and declared himself the Emperor. Ma Xiang was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Ma Xiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
